headline: Assessing Starbucks (SBUX) Valuation As New Rewards Program And Analyst Downgrade Shape Turnaround Expectations
summary: Starbucks (SBUX) has just launched a new tiered rewards program, while analyst commentary, including a downgrade from Wolfe Research, is stressing tougher coffee competition and the need for clear, sustained progress in its turnaround. See our latest analysis for Starbucks. The new rewards rollout and store footprint changes come as investors weigh a recent 16.2% 90 day share price return and 18.1% year to date share price return against a more modest 3.9% one year total shareholder return...
